mechanism_narrative: A rise in unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market, which compresses the demand for goods and services, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the housing market signals a decrease in demand for goods and services, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below 1000 units in 3 months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in industrial production signals a strengthening supply of goods and services, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in contraction periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the consumer price index signals a decrease in inflation expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the payroll employment rate signals an increase in demand for goods and services, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in contraction periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate signals a strengthening labor market, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weakening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the GDP growth rate signals a decrease in demand for goods and services, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in contraction periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
